dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 10 Power for each percent of health you are missing.

dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 10 Power for each percent of health you are missing.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 100 Power for each enemy you are engaged in battle with. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pilgrim (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 1% for every enemy you faced when starting combat, to a max of 10% for 10s. If facing only one enemy at start, the bonus is +5% for 1 minute. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 100 Power for each enemy you are engaged in battle with. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pilgrim (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 1% for every enemy you faced when starting combat, to a max of 10% for 10s. If facing only one enemy at start, the bonus is +5% for 1 minute. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 200 Power for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pioneer (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You gain an increased stat for each party member. Party of 1: +200 Power. 2: +400 Power+Defense. 3: +400 Power+Defense+Accuracy. 4: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike. 5: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike+Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 200 Power for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pioneer (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You gain an increased stat for each party member. Party of 1: +200 Power. 2: +400 Power+Defense. 3: +400 Power+Defense+Accuracy. 4: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike. 5: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike+Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1% Power for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Primal (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: If you are hit or healed for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 10% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1% Power for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 250 Power for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Haste
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Recharge Speed for each enemy you are engaged in battle within 100'. Max 10 Stacks: 10% Recharge Speed.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Alacrity
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Recharge Speed is increased by 0.6% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 3% Recharge Speed.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7.5% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Greater Adaptive Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Divinity maximum increases by 15%. Gain 3.5% Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Force
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to deal 150 magnitude damage around you. This effect may only occur once every 15 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Parry
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 25 Deflect for each percent of health you are missing.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Tactical Insight
dbEquipBonuses.description: Per 6s in combat: +0.4% Awareness, +0.1% Power to allies in 20'. Max 8 (3.2% / 0.8% per ally)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reptilial Reflex
dbEquipBonuses.description: On Critical Strike against you, reflect 10% of your Maximum Hit Points as damage and gain +7.5% Awareness for 10 seconds. (20 second cooldown)
